title: laneStabilityContract.v1
description: Phase-2 stability contract for a traversable lane between nodes, defining invariant and sanity metric bands and admissible perturbations.

id.description: Stable identifier for this lane stability contract.

phase.description: Lifecycle phase; lane stability contracts are Phase-2 bundle artifacts.

tier.description: Policy/entitlement tier, aligned with Constellation-Contracts tier routing.

regionRef.description: Reference to a regionContractCard or region/run contract this lane belongs to.

laneRef.description: Reference to the underlying lane or connection in dungeon-node / topology contracts.

schemaref.description: Logical schema identifier for this contract type.

prismMeta.description: Standard prism metadata block used across Constellation-Contracts.

invariantBands.description: Invariant bands for this lane, constrained by region/run envelopes and canonical invariants.v1.json.

sanityBands.description: Lane-level bands for derived sanity metrics as read by SANITY_CORE.

sanityPolicy.description: Policy for how SANITY_CORE should treat excursions and perturbations along this lane.

stabilityClass.description: Qualitative class for routing and safety policies.

maxDetDeltaPerTraversal.description: Maximum DET change allowed over a single full traversal of this lane.

maxCdlDeltaPerTraversal.description: Maximum CDL change allowed per full traversal.

allowedExcursionRatio.description: Fraction of traversal steps allowed to leave target bands before SANITY_CORE must clamp or reroute.

sanityFailureMode.description: What SANITY_CORE should request when bands are violated persistently.

safetyEnvelope.description: Optional safety caps derived from consent/budget policies and Dead-Ledger decisions.

telemetryHints.description: Hints for how to log and analyze lane stability (for UEC/EMD/STCI/CDL/ARR calibration).

logBucketId.description: Optional grouping key for telemetry aggregation.

deadLedgerRef.description: Opaque Dead-Ledger reference anchoring this lane stability contract.

notes.description: Designer-facing rationale and commentary; ignored by runtime.

invariantBand01.description: Min, max for a 0.0–1.0 normalized invariant.

invariantBandDet.description: Min, max for DET, 0.0–10.0 as in the canonical spine.

metricBand01.description: Min, max for a 0.0–1.0 sanity/entertainment metric.
